resources.string: A clean and elegant local music player
This system folder path is not supported
There are no songs yet. Scan music now?
Move floating lyrics back to the upper middle of the screen to avoid blocking the status bar
Please grant floating window permission first
Show compact floating lyrics in the empty status bar area, with touch passthrough for notification shade gestures
Shows lyrics via Android heads-up notifications on non-Flyme devices. You may need to allow pop-up notifications for this channel.
Shows lyrics via Android heads-up notifications on non-Flyme devices
Hide floating lyrics while playback is paused, then restore them when playback resumes
Reserve extra vertical space for cutouts and the status bar
Force Simplified Chinese for the app UI
Force English for the app UI
Lyricon, desktop lyrics, status bar lyrics, and car lyrics
Playback, decoding, shuffle, and audio focus
Export and restore settings, listening history, and statistics
Clear WebDAV and LX artwork, lyrics, and remote metadata cache
Online artwork and lyric cache cleared
View detailed logs, warnings, and crash records
Ella Music runtime logs, generated at: %1$s

%1$d logs, showing %2$d; errors %3$d, warnings %4$d. Ella automatically captures this process logcat, network failures, and key playback, lyric, and scan logs, keeping at most the last %5$d days and 3000 records.
This will clear all %1$d persisted logs. This cannot be undone.
Gaussian Blur: stable and power efficient
Liquid Glass: blur with refraction for more depth
Choose the app light or dark appearance
Show albums, genres, years, and similar pages in %1$d columns
Merge album artists into the artist list and show a release albums tab on artist pages
Automatically open the player after starting local, WebDAV, or online songs
Show Play Next in song lists
Show the quick action beside duration in song lists; turning it off keeps the action in the song menu
Aspect Pro requires a local audio file
Could not open Aspect Pro. Make sure it is installed
Audio recording permission is required to enable visualization
Visualization is only available in immersive cover mode
This song has no artist information to open
This song has no album information to open
No NetEase Cloud Music information available
Playback will pause after the current song
This system cannot open the media output panel directly. Bluetooth settings opened instead
Check the latest version on GitHub Releases
Fetching the latest version from GitHub Releases
This release does not include a changelog.
Connecting to GitHub to fetch the latest Ella Music release.
Current version v%1$s. Tap to view the latest APK and changelog.
Current version v%1$s. No newer release is available right now.
No music files found. They may be excluded by blocked-folder rules.
Scan all music in the system media library
Overview, audio format, and quality stats
%1$d directories; use the plus button to add more
Remove “%1$s”? The local folder will not be deleted.
%1$d folders are excluded. Tap to manage or unblock.
Search songs, artists, albums, or filenames
This folder has no music files
Remote directory is empty or has no playable audio
When enabled, Ella requests microphone permission to read the current playback spectrum.
Adjust playback volume automatically from audio tags
When enabled, playback will no longer take audio focus from other apps
Shuffle one song after launch and library load, starting from the beginning
Restore the last queue and continue from the last position after launch
Use only the Android system decoder; unsupported formats will fail to play
Fallback to FFmpeg only when the system decoder cannot handle the format
Shuffle the queue and try not to repeat songs within one round
Pick songs randomly every time, so repeats can happen back to back
Always switch to the previous song in the queue
Replay the current song after 20 seconds; within 20 seconds it still jumps to the previous song
Visible sections, home section order, and library grid order
The music library entry block on the home page
Automatically start playback when a Bluetooth audio device connects
Show semi-transparent circular outlines on playback control buttons in non-immersive mode
Export settings, listening history, and heatmap ranking data
Restore settings, history, and stats from a backup JSON
Unable to open the backup file
Unable to read the backup file
Open this song for tag editing in Lyrico
Send a content Uri to Music Tag for editing
Pause after the current song finishes
External editing is not supported for online / WebDAV songs
Lyrico, LunaBeat, or Music Tag was not found. Install one and try again.
Write permission is required to save
LunaBeat lyric timing was not found. Install it and try again.
Ella passes the current song path to the selected app and refreshes this song after you return.
Search songs, albums, artists, tags, or lyrics
Search songs, albums, artists, tags, or lyrics
Search the music library, or quickly find duplicate songs
No duplicate songs with the same title and album were found
Read local video cover files and request video or gallery permission only when needed
Grant video permission in system settings before enabling dynamic cover
Video permission not granted, dynamic cover was disabled
After enabling and choosing an image, show it for about 3 seconds whenever Ella opens
Show a custom wallpaper behind library, album, playlist, folder, and similar pages
Only shown on tablet landscape player pages and phone non-immersive player pages
Show a small badge at the bottom-right of the non-immersive player cover for Hi-Res tracks
Uses the built-in Hi-Res badge when no image is selected
Restore the unselected state and delete the image copy saved in Ella
Extend the album cover to the top of the player; disable it to use the compact rounded cover layout
Show Favorites and Five-star entries on playlist page
When off, the playlist page only shows custom playlists; favorites and ratings stay available as library filters
Control the top featured card on the home page
Used for song AI interpretation and stored only on this device
OpenAI-compatible Chat Completions endpoint; /chat/completions is appended automatically
For example %1$s; change it to any model available to your account
Leave blank to show Ella Music; fill a name to show by @name
Shortcut label shown when long-pressing the app icon on the launcher
Scan music files automatically on startup
Filter audio files shorter than %1$d seconds
One per line; for example /, feat., &
One per line; these names are protected before separator splitting
One per line; used for genre classification
One per line; for example compound genre names containing /
Merge tags that differ only by letter case, such as LiSA and LISA
Show the current lyric in the mini player while playing; disable it to show the song title and artist
Use the Lyricon smooth lyric view on the lyric page
Open it, then long press and drag an item to adjust the loading order
Read TTML LYRICS from audio tags first
Show lyric translation when the mini player is displaying lyrics
Rotate the mini player cover during playback; disable it to keep a static cover
Send pronunciation or romanization as the secondary line to Lyricon
Show the current lyric above other apps using a floating window
Prevent the floating lyric window from being dragged; unlock it here or from the lock notification
Increase the display size of the main lyric and pronunciation
Scale the translation line independently for desktop lyrics
Reduce this to make the lyric lighter; the value is kept even when locked
Improve readability on bright wallpapers; set to 0 to disable the shadow
Publish per-word lyrics to the SuperLyric ecosystem through SuperLyricApi
Disable this to send only the original text without a translation line through SuperLyricApi
Send pronunciation or romanization as the secondary line through SuperLyricApi
Send the current original lyric through the Lyric Getter API
Show lyrics through ticker notifications on Meizu devices
Reuse the playback notification and update only the ticker to avoid showing an extra lyric notification in the shade.
Write the translation into the notification body so Samsung floating notifications can try to show two lines.
When the FLYme lyric notification is hidden, Ella reuses the playback notification and cannot also write into the Samsung floating notification body.
Show pronunciation or secondary line in status bar
Send the pronunciation or translation secondary line as the second line of the status bar lyric.
Write the current lyric into the media notification title for Bluetooth devices, car head units, or media centers.
Send translation to media notification lyrics
Replace the media artist line with the current lyric translation.
Send pronunciation to media notification lyrics
Replace the media artist line with the current pronunciation or romanization.
Listening time starts accumulating after you play music
Play counts start accumulating after you play music
Daily listening time over the last 8 weeks
Recently played items will appear here after you start playback
This launcher does not support pinned shortcuts
Delete playlist “%1$s”? Songs in the playlist will not be removed from local storage.
Songs you heart on the player page will be collected here
Songs rated five stars in file tags will appear here
This playlist does not contain any songs yet
Remove “%2$s” from “%1$s”? The local file will not be deleted.
Remove the selected %1$d songs from this playlist? Local files will not be deleted.
Clear existing custom playlists and import again
Merge and replace playlists with the same name
Keep other playlists and overwrite same-name playlists with imported content
Merge and keep playlists with the same name
For same-name playlists, append only songs that are not already present
Export local song paths line by line
Export an #EXTM3U playlist including song info and local paths
Failed to add as next up
No artist page is available for this song
No album page is available for this song
Remove “%1$s” from the current playlist? The local file will not be deleted.
Delete “%1$s” permanently? This may remove the local audio file.
Remove “%1$s” from the library? The local file will not be deleted.
Tap to view linked NetEase info
No songs found. Tap the refresh button in the top-right corner to scan again.
Delete the selected %1$d songs permanently? This may remove the local audio files.
Go to Settings > Preferences > AI interpretation and fill in the OpenAI API key first.
Loading song info and lyrics, then requesting OpenAI interpretation...
No navigable NetEase information could be parsed
Unable to open the NetEase link
